item.title: 6Dutchgold: Paddy Desmond @6Dutchgold · 59min Just back from tullamore . Disappointing result but the atmosphere was brilliant ! Lei
item.description: Paddy Desmond @6Dutchgold · 59min Just back from tullamore . Disappointing result but the atmosphere was brilliant ! Leinster hurling championship will have plenty more surprises I suspect ! 2 188

item.title: Race_iQ: RaceiQ @Race_iQ · 1h Eight runners in the Greenham and six different fastest furlong "winners". Overall Time Index 5.7,
item.description:
RaceiQ @Race_iQ · 1h Eight runners in the Greenham and six different fastest furlong "winners". Overall Time Index 5.7, when the Meeting Average was 5.6.
F1: Alparsian 14.84sec F2: Gonna Fly 11.52 F3: Aqpan 11.43 F4: Albert Einstein 11.72 F5: Aqpan 11.37 F6: Zavateri 11.43 F7: Needle Match Mostrar más Cita ITV Racing @itvracing · 9h What a winner for Clifford Lee!
Alparlsan wins Watership Down Stud Too Darn Hot Greenham Stakes
#ITVRacing | @CliffordleexLee | @karl_burke Este video no está disponible en tu ubicación. 1 934
